title: Phase 1: Wrapper pre-flight (bash + PowerShell)
description: Add a pre-flight block in scripts/moe-agent.sh and scripts/moe-agent.ps1 that calls chat_join, chat_send, chat_read (general + task channel), claim_next_task, get_context, recall BEFORE spawning the CLI. Bake results into the CLI system prompt. Replace the long multi-step SHORT_PROMPT with a lean per-role implementation prompt. Preserve --no-auto-claim bypass.
